title: SpaceX launches Starship test flight on second try
description: SpaceX launched its massive Starship rocket on Friday, a day after the company scrubbed plans before takeoff.

title: India Raises Diesel, Gasoline Prices for Third Time in Eight Days
description: India’s state-run refiners raised retail prices again of diesel and gasoline on Saturday to help processors cut losses on discounted sales and to control a spike in demand.

title: SpaceX launches massive Starship V3 rocket on test flight
description: The launch of the largest and most powerful in history has happened, after a first attempted launch on Thursday was postponed.

title: Rubio visits India to sell energy as Iran oil shock persists
description: The top US diplomat has made statements offering to support India’s energy needs - but should Delhi give in?

title: More than 40,000 Californians evacuated due to chemical tank leak
description: Officials have warned that the tank contains a "highly volatile" substance that could lead to an explosion.

title: Moment SpaceX rocket explodes in the Indian Ocean after splashdown
description: Elon Musk's SpaceX has successfully launched its Starship V3 rocket, which landed in a planned fiery explosion on Friday.

title: Mob Burns Congo Ebola Center Amid Rare Strain Outbreak
description: Several hundred people massed at the gates of a hospital to demand the body of a suspected Ebola victim. Violence broke out when staff refused the request.

title: What is GKN Aerospace, the Company Whose California Plant Is at Risk of Exploding?
description: A chemical leak occurred at one of the company’s manufacturing plants in California, raising concerns about an explosion.

title: Some fear US-Philippines war games are drawing conflict closer to home
description: Critics of US, Philippine military cooperation say closely aligning with Washington makes Manila a possible target.

title: Tulsi Gabbard resigns as Trump’s top US intelligence official
description: Tulsi Gabbard has resigned as US Director of National Intelligence, citing her husband’s cancer diagnosis.

title: Ebola outbreak disrupts life along the DRC-Uganda border
description: With almost 750 suspected Ebola cases in the DRC, health measures intensified along the DRC–Uganda border

title: Iran war live: Tehran says diplomacy continues but no deal yet with US
description: Israeli attacks on Lebanon have killed at least 3,111 people since March 2, with 9,432 injured: Health Ministry.

title: For China’s ailing developers, retail frenzy greets semiconductor side-hustles
description: Embattled Chinese developers have turned to a new strategy to resuscitate their ailing businesses: diversifying into semiconductor production. Certain listed property companies have seen their shares skyrocket – some by hundreds of per cent – after announcing investments in “chipmaking”. Such strategic diversification efforts have sparked a buying frenzy among retail investors in the mainland’s A-share market. “Chip-themed stocks are the new darlings of individual investors since [such stocks]...

title: Liquidity drain from SpaceX’s mega listing unlikely to ripple into Hong Kong: JPMorgan
description: A liquidity drain caused by SpaceX’s gargantuan US share sale is unlikely to ripple into regional markets, including Hong Kong, thanks to global investors’ push to diversify and their growing interest in future profit stars, according to JPMorgan. Hong Kong could still aim for the runner-up position in fundraising this year despite potentially giving up the global initial public offering (IPO) crown to New York, said Paul Uren, the US bank’s Asia-Pacific investment banking head, on...

title: SpaceX launches Starship test flight on second try

title: Nvidia poured $18.6 billion into venture-capital investments in just three months. Where does the cash trail lead?
description: A rapidly growing asset class on Nvidia’s balance sheet reveals how deeply tethered its future is to the financial health of its partners

title: Consumer sentiment sinks to an all-time low. Is this about Democrats’ distaste for Trump?
description: A long-running survey of how Americans feel about the economy sank to another all-time low — but not just because Democrats are furious at President Trump and his policies.

title: This 2008 ‘train wreck’ oil scenario could unfold if Hormuz isn’t opened by end of August
description: There’s a new warning from the commodity market about the risks of a delayed reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Abrego Garcia Wins Dismissal of US Human-Smuggling Case
description: A federal judge in Tennessee dismissed human-smuggling charges against Salvadoran migrant Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia after concluding the US government brought the case in retaliation for his legal fight against being deported.
